HTB Academy Speedrun: Technical Retrospective on CWES & CPTS

#CPTS #CWES #HACKTHEBOX #CERTIFICATIONS // 2025-12-28

// IMG_REF: CPTS_100_VERIFIED

// IMG_REF: CWES_100_VERIFIED

MISSION DEBRIEF: 100% Completion of HTB Academy CPTS & CWES Paths.

After an intense 4-week sprint—roughly 200-250 hours—I completed Hack The Box Academy’s Web Penetration Tester (CWES) and Penetration Tester (CPTS) paths. Together, they cover over 800,000 words of offensive security content, plus countless hands-on labs.

🏗️ Architecture over Tooling

The curriculum emphasizes protocol behavior and trust boundaries over simple tool usage. You learn not just how to exploit something, but why it fails.

⚖️ Difficulty & Methodology

The challenge isn’t CTF trickery, but disciplined enumeration and maintaining a clean methodology across long attack chains. Labs reward structure and consistency while penalizing randomness.

🧠 Learning at Speed: Tactics

To scale at this pace (12–14 hour days), structure beats memorization:

  • Concept First: Understand the attack path before the command.
  • Selective AI: Used Gemini Pro to distill dense sections and maintain focus on decision-making.
  • Active Inquiry: Constantly questioning the “why” behind tool capabilities to grow skills beyond the curriculum.

🏁 Verdict

HTB Academy defines a strong operational baseline. Completing both paths lays the foundation for advanced tracks like OSEP or CAPE.

Next steps: Pro Labs (Dante, Zephyr, POO, RastaLabs), methodology battle-testing, then the CPTS exam 💀.
